name: lab-1-micro-blog-advanced
description: Version advanced du Lab 1 - Micro Blog

scripts.install:all: concurrently "npm --prefix host-app install" "npm --prefix articles-list-app install" "npm --prefix article-details-app install"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix host-app start" "npm --prefix articles-list-app start" "npm --prefix article-details-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix host-app run build" "npm --prefix articles-list-app run build" "npm --prefix article-details-app run build"
